templates.text: {echoText}. The name reverberates. Someone — or something — down here remembers them.
A shadow in the shape of {echoText}. It watches. It has been watching for a long time.
'{echoText}' is scratched into the archway. The handwriting is your own.
The shade of {echoText} stands at the threshold. It does not move. It does not need to.
You know {echoText} now. That knowledge has weight. The floor sinks slightly beneath you.
{echoText} tried this dungeon too. Their name is carved somewhere in the lower levels — but not on a victory stone.
Even dust remembers {echoText}. The particles arrange themselves differently when their name is spoken here.
{echoText} died knowing this. You live knowing it. The dungeon wonders which is the better outcome.
The name {echoText} joins the others carved into the walls.
You carry {echoText}'s legacy now. The dungeon takes note.
The dungeon's catalogue updates. {echoText}. One more entry among thousands — but this one is yours.
The corridor repeats {echoText} to itself. It has been waiting for someone to say it.
The dead know {echoText}. So do you now. The walls acknowledge the shared knowledge without ceremony.
Your passage through this room is marked now — {echoText} spoken, registered, filed.
The stone around you is older than {echoText}. It has absorbed stranger names. It absorbs this one too.
